calendar.matters: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jan-05-2026 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter was put on for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. No one appeared to object.

There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated April 25, 2009 was admitted to probate.

Nila Bogue Staudt was appointed as Executor, with full IAEA authority. Bond was not required.

Michael Kasolas was appointed probate referee. The Court disclosed that the assigned probate referee is married to a legal advisory staff member of this court.

The Court set a status hearing for filing of a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration for June 28, 2027, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204. If either petition is filed at least two weeks prior to the status date, no appearance is required.

Judge: Ross C. Moody; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)
